project_type: Monorepo; flagship Next.js apps with rich backends but stubbed headline UI flows
verification_instructions: Each fixed flow must work end-to-end against the backend (depends on Phase 83 prisma/auth/ports). Add a test per flow (action triggers the right API call).
setup_instructions: pnpm install. Requires Phase 83 (prisma injection, auth, ports) merged first.
environment_constraints: Do not duplicate Kiro PR #109 (it added real SSE streaming to quantai and centralized quantchat auth token + NEXT_PUBLIC_WS_URL). Build on top of it.
key_patterns: Hooks already exist but are unused by the UI: apps/quantmail/src/hooks/useEmail.ts has sendEmail; the compose page must call it. quantdrive has /api/drive/upload routes but UploadArea.handleUpload is a no-op. quantmeet needs a real WebRTC client (livekit-client) wired to the livekit-server-sdk backend.
directory_structure: Next App Router apps with backend/ Fastify servers. quantmeet backend uses livekit-server-sdk but the frontend lacks a WebRTC client.
